steps.title: Clear the denominator
steps.content:
Start with:
$$
u-4=\frac{12}{t-3}
$$
Multiply both sides by $t-3$:
$$
(u-4)(t-3)=12
$$

steps.title: Isolate the variable
steps.content:
Divide by $u-4$ and add $3$:
$$
t-3=\frac{12}{u-4}
$$
$$
t=3+\frac{12}{u-4}
$$

steps.title: Combine into one fraction
steps.content: Use a common denominator: $$ t=\frac{3(u-4)}{u-4}+\frac{12}{u-4}=\frac{3u-12+12}{u-4}=\frac{3u}{u-4} $$ The answer is D.
